_comment: Public-safe template for OPTIONAL remote benchmark/test endpoints.
Copy this to tools/fleet_endpoints.local.json or tools/fleet_endpoints.json
and fill in real tailnet hostnames/IPs on a private machine. Local registry
files are gitignored; do not commit real tailnet names, personal hostnames,

driver.name: benchmark-driver
driver.note: Local driver allowed to reach endpoint serve/ssh ports.

safety.serve_recommendation: Prefer a private tailnet-only serve path. Never bind 0.0.0.0 on a personal machine.
safety.acl_scope: Restrict endpoint serve/ssh ports to the benchmark driver.
safety.auth: Tailnet identity provides transport auth. The local model shim uses --api-key-env NONE_LOCAL; no real API keys cross the wire.
safety.optin: enabled defaults to false. A device owner flips it true only after setup and consent.
safety.resource_guard: Cap server threads or run with lower priority so benchmarks do not monopolize a personal machine.
safety.reversible: Every step should be undoable: stop the server, turn off the private serve path, remove the ACL rule.

endpoints.name: worker-a
endpoints.notes: Example endpoint. Replace only in an ignored local registry.
